_comment: Reference MCP server definitions for the nddev-developer setup. The installer merges these into cli/config.json under mcp.servers (ZCode native key is mcp.servers, not the top-level mcpServers). Server entry shapes — stdio: { "command": "...", "args": [...], "env": {...} }; http: { "type": "http", "url": "..." }. Secrets referenced as ${VAR_NAME} are rendered from build/.env at install time. Keep empty until a server is deliberately added.
